description_cn: 使四边形有个外接圆。尽量使四边形网格四点共圆。通常和“planarize”配合使用来获取圆形网格。使一个四个角点不共圆的四边形，变成一个四个角点共圆的四边形。
description_en: Try to make the four corner points of a quadrilateral grid concyclic. This is often used in conjunction with "planarize" to obtain a circular grid. It transforms a quadrilateral whose four corner points are not concyclic into a quadrilateral whose four corner points are concyclic.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
